entity.summary: On-chain spot central-limit-order-book decentralized exchange on Somnia mainnet, providing wallet-funded order placement, live order books, market-making, grid, momentum, mean-reversion, and TWAP execution interfaces through current REST and WebSocket APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party material from the official Somnia organization identifies dreamDEX as an on-chain spot CLOB on Somnia and publishes production mainnet API, WebSocket, market, order, and bot-integration surfaces. The repository documents a June 2026 spot-contract upgrade and current mainnet chain ID 5031. No exact initial launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: dreamDEX protocol documentation
evidence.notes: First-party protocol documentation for the Somnia on-chain spot CLOB, linked by the official Somnia organization and covering current exchange and integration behavior.

evidence.title: Somnia dreamDEX bot kit
evidence.notes: Official Somnia organization repository identifies dreamDEX as an on-chain spot CLOB, documents current mainnet chain ID, production REST and WebSocket endpoints, live market inspection, order execution, and the June 2026 contract interface.
